label: Rosie-specific workflow
purpose: Use for images or photos that are explicitly about Rosie or where Rosie appears in the image.
selection_rule: Choose this workflow whenever the requested image is about Rosie, depicts Rosie, or explicitly includes Rosie in the scene.
applies_when: The user explicitly asks for Rosie-related images.
The main subject of the image is Rosie.
Rosie is explicitly present in the requested scene.
does_not_apply_when: The image request is general and unrelated to Rosie.
